description: A comprehensive school management platform designed for African schools. Manage classes, track progress, and foster communication between parents, teachers, and students.
roleDescription: Choose how you'll be using EduConnect to access your personalized dashboard.
parentDescription: Monitor your child's progress, communicate with teachers, and stay updated on school activities.
teacherDescription: Manage classes, track student progress, create assignments, and communicate with parents.
studentDescription: Access assignments, view grades, participate in discussions, and manage your academic journey.
educationDescription: Everything you need to manage school operations efficiently, with features designed specifically for African educational institutions.

multiRole.title: Multi-Role Access
multiRole.description: Dedicated dashboards for parents, teachers, and students with role-specific features.

offline.title: Offline Support
offline.description: Teachers can take attendance offline and sync when internet is available.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-Language
multiLanguage.description: Support for English, French, and local African languages.

mobile.title: Mobile-First
mobile.description: Optimized for smartphones and tablets with responsive design.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.description: Safe environment for educational data and communications.

studyGroups.title: Study Groups
studyGroups.description: Students can collaborate in moderated study groups and forums.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your School?
cta.description: Join thousands of schools already using EduConnect to improve educational outcomes and streamline operations across Africa.
